ocr.text: In Table 1, the headers are "Initiation of stress," "End of stress," and "Harvest," with respective dates 05/07/2013, 08/07/2014,
01/08/2013, 31/07/2014, 26/09/2013, and 30/09/2014. The row labeled "Cumulated thermal time (°Cd)" shows values of 370.2,
1355.70, and 1272.85. The row "Cumulated rainfall (mm)" presents figures of 43.2, 45.4, 47.0, 58.2, 75.2, and 363.4.

"Cumulated water supply (mm)" under the "WW" condition lists values as 138.2, 140, 211, 275.7, 368.2, and 735.5, while
under "WD," the values are 138.2, 143.1, 160, 188.9, 317.2, and 683. In Table 2, the header "Node A" and "Node B" includes
pairs such as "Left medial OFG" and "Left cerebellum (10th lobule)," "Right SOC" and "Left cerebellum (10th lobule)," "Left
paracentral lobule" and "Left cerebellum (10th lobule)," "Left cerebellum (10th lobule)" and "Left posterior insula," "Left
paracentral lobule" and "Left rostral ACC," and "Left paracentral lobule" and "Right rostral ACC.".
